message:
🐛 Fix Helm chart GHCR package visibility (#714)

Push chart to oci://ghcr.io/llm-d (org-level) instead of
oci://ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-workload-variant-autoscaler (nested).

Nested packages (with slashes in their name) cannot have their
visibility changed via the GitHub API or UI, making them permanently
private. Moving to org-level creates a flat package name that supports
the PATCH visibility API.

Also adds a step to explicitly set the chart package to public after
each push.

New chart OCI reference:
  oci://ghcr.io/llm-d/workload-variant-autoscaler:<version>

Fixes: anonymous helm pull returns 401 unauthorized

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -149,8 +149,22 @@ jobs:
           VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
           CHART_FILE="workload-variant-autoscaler-${VERSION}.tgz"
 
+          # Push to org-level path to avoid nested sub-package (slashes in
+          # GHCR package names prevent visibility changes via API/UI).
           helm push "$CHART_FILE" \
-            oci://ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-workload-variant-autoscaler
+            oci://ghcr.io/llm-d
+
+      # -----------------------------------------
+      # 10b. Ensure Helm chart package is public
+      # -----------------------------------------
+      - name: Set Helm chart package visibility to public
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CR_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          gh api --method PATCH \
+            -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
+            "/orgs/${{ github.repository_owner }}/packages/container/workload-variant-autoscaler" \
+            -f visibility='public' || echo "::warning::Could not set chart package to public — may need manual update"
 
       # -----------------------------------------
       # 11. Commit updated chart files
